creator: andrej.zverev@gmail.com
text:
Hello.
few notes
1. I don't think we really need Dist::CheckConflicts since it useless  
and don't affect on build and run processes.
2. It don't required Scalar::List::Utils as I can see (probably you  
mistyped). Scalar::Util part of coremodules since perl 5.7

So, if you make follow-up with changes to TEST_DEPENDS I or anyone  
else will commit changes.
Thanks!
